name: Alfa S.A.B. de C.V. Registered
summary: Alfa S.A.B. de C.V. is a Mexican conglomerate that manages a diverse portfolio of companies in the petrochemicals, food, telecommunications, IT, and energy sectors. Headquartered in Monterrey, Mexico, Alfa operates globally, focusing on value creation and sustainable growth across its different businesses. The company aims to deliver long-term shareholder value through its diversified operations.
